paragraphs.source: The HBM–DRAM conundrum becomes even more complex when factoring in market reactions to the worsening DRAM shortage driven by HBM capacity reallocation. As commodity DRAM supply has tightened materially due to HBM expansion, pricing and margins have surged over the past several quarters. Commodity DRAM margins are now on par with—or in many cases exceeding—HBM margins since late 4Q, a trend we believe will persist over the next few quarters. This is particularly the case for Samsung, which has lower margin in producing HBM. We first highlighted this development in our Core Research numerous times last year.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The HBM–DRAM conundrum becomes even more complex when factoring in market reactions to the worsening DRAM shortage driven by HBM capacity reallocation. As commodity DRAM supply has tightened materially due to HBM expansion, pricing and margins have surged over the past several quarters. Commodity DRAM margins are now on par with—or in many cases exceeding—HBM margins since late 4Q, a trend we believe will persist over the next few quarters. This is particularly the case for Samsung, which has lower margin in producing HBM. We first highlighted this development in our [Core Research](https://semianalysis.com/core-research/) numerous times last year.

Commodity DRAM margins are now on par with—or in many cases exceeding—HBM margins since late 4Q, a trend we believe will persist over the next few quarters. This is particularly the case for Samsung, which has lower margin in producing HBM. We first highlighted this development in our Core Research numerous times last year.

pro.text: 若将市场对 DRAM 短缺加剧（由 HBM 产能腾挪所致）的反应纳入考量，HBM 与 DRAM 之间的博弈困局便愈发错综复杂。由于 HBM 扩产导致大宗DRAM 供应显著收紧，其价格与利润率在过去几个季度一路狂飙。自四季度末以来，大宗DRAM 的利润率已与 HBM 齐平，甚至在诸多情况下实现了反超。我们认为这一趋势将在未来几个季度延续。三星的情况尤为典型，其 HBM 生产利润率相对较低。去年，我们已在 Core Research 中多次率先预警这一动向。

paragraphs.source: We view this as a significant and crucial challenge for memory suppliers. Given the combination of an attractive margin outlook and superior bit output from manufacturing and selling commodity DRAM, alongside the increased manufacturing complexity associated with HBM4, some suppliers may adopt a more deliberate approach in 2026—carefully balancing HBM capacity expansion against conventional DRAM production. This dynamic is likely to be more pronounced for suppliers that perceive their near-term ability to gain HBM share to be constrained by product competitiveness and aim to exploit commodity DRAM to maintain it memory business performance.

Given the combination of an attractive margin outlook and superior bit output from manufacturing and selling commodity DRAM, alongside the increased manufacturing complexity associated with HBM4, some suppliers may adopt a more deliberate approach in 2026—carefully balancing HBM capacity expansion against conventional DRAM production. This dynamic is likely to be more pronounced for suppliers that perceive their near-term ability to gain HBM share to be constrained by product competitiveness and aim to exploit commodity DRAM to maintain it memory business performance.

Given the combination of an attractive margin outlook and superior bit output from manufacturing and selling commodity DRAM, alongside the increased manufacturing complexity associated with HBM4, some suppliers may adopt a more deliberate approach in 2026—carefully balancing HBM capacity expansion against conventional DRAM production. This dynamic is likely to be more pronounced for suppliers that perceive their near-term ability to gain HBM share to be constrained by product competitiveness and aim to exploit commodity DRAM to maintain it memory business performance.

pro.text: 我们认为，这给存储供应商带来了重大且关键的挑战。一方面，制造与销售大宗DRAM 兼具诱人的利润率前景与更高的比特产出；另一方面，HBM4 的制造复杂度日益攀升。双重因素交织下，部分供应商在 2026 年或将采取更为审慎的策略，在 HBM 扩产与传统 DRAM 生产之间谨慎走钢丝。对于那些自认短期内受限于产品竞争力、难以夺取 HBM 份额的供应商而言，这一动向势必更为显著，他们将试图充分榨取大宗DRAM 的红利，借此维持其存储业务的业绩表现。

paragraphs.source: One major contributor to the current shortage that we have not yet discussed in depth is limited cleanroom availability. Following the memory upcycle during the pandemic, memory suppliers adopted a more conservative approach to capex and capacity expansion. This caution resulted in an underinvestment backdrop entering 2025 and extending into 2026. As demand has continued to accelerate, memory suppliers are now constrained by insufficient cleanroom capacity, limiting their ability to respond on the supply side.

pro.text: 导致当前短缺的另一大主因（前文尚未深入探讨）在于洁净室空间紧缺。经历疫情期间的存储上行周期后，各大存储供应商在资本支出与产能扩张上纷纷转向保守。这种谨慎态度直接导致 2025 年乃至 2026 年面临投资不足的窘境。随着需求持续加速，存储供应商如今处处受制于洁净室产能不足，其在供应端的响应能力大打折扣。

paragraphs.source: As we track DRAM capacity additions across all major suppliers, we estimate that virtually all incremental wafer capacity in 2026 will be concentrated in just three fabs: Samsung’s P4 (mostly Phase 1 and Phase 3 with limited input for Phase 4 in late ‘26), SK hynix’s M15X, and Micron’s A3. Importantly, both Micron’s A3 and SK Hynix’s M15X are expected to be predominantly allocated to HBM production rather than conventional DRAM, which will limit the incremental wafer and bit output.

Importantly, both Micron’s A3 and SK Hynix’s M15X are expected to be predominantly allocated to HBM production rather than conventional DRAM, which will limit the incremental wafer and bit output.

Importantly, both Micron’s A3 and SK Hynix’s M15X are expected to be predominantly allocated to HBM production rather than conventional DRAM, which will limit the incremental wafer and bit output.

pro.text: 追踪各大供应商的 DRAM 产能扩张轨迹后，我们预计 2026 年几乎所有的新增晶圆产能都将高度集中于三座晶圆厂：三星的 P4（主要为一期与三期，四期在 2026 年末投片量有限）、SK海力士的 M15X，以及美光的 A3。关键在于，美光 A3 与 SK海力士 M15X 的绝大部分产能预计将倾斜给 HBM 生产，而非传统 DRAM。这必将进一步限制晶圆与比特产出的整体增量。

Although Phase 2 of P4 was initially scheduled to come online in 1Q27, we believe the timeline could be pulled forward. Even that, we think the material wafer output contribution of Phase 2 should still come in 1H27.

paragraphs.source: Even Micron’s recently acquired P5 Tongluo fab from PSMC is unlikely to contribute meaningful wafer output until 2H27. At full utilization, the site offers a maximum capacity of approximately 45k wafers per month for commodity DRAM, with effective output potentially lower if the fab is configured for HBM production due to greater cleanroom requirements for back-end equipment such as TC bonders and a more complex manufacturing process.

pro.text: 即便美光近期刚从力积电手中收购了 P5铜锣厂，该厂在 2027 年下半年之前也难以贡献实质性的晶圆产出。在满负荷运转下，该厂区每月最多可提供约 4.5 万片大宗DRAM 晶圆产能。然而，若将其转为 HBM 产线，由于热压键合机等后道设备对洁净室空间要求极高，加之制造工艺更为复杂，其实际有效产出势必进一步缩水。

paragraphs.source: With these constraints in mind, the central question is how the industry can meaningfully expand bit supply. We currently forecast ~21% bit growth this year and ~19% next year. In our view, the primary driver of this growth will be accelerated node migration to 1b and 1c across the three major memory suppliers. Achieving this growth requires a faster pace of transition to these nodes, which deliver materially higher bit output per wafer than trailing nodes and seem to be t the most effective remaining lever for bit expansion in a wafer-constrained environment.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: With these constraints in mind, the central question is how the industry can meaningfully expand bit supply. We currently forecast ~21% bit growth this year and ~19% next year. In our view, the primary driver of this growth will be accelerated node migration to 1b and 1c across the three major memory suppliers. Achieving this growth requires a faster pace of transition to these nodes, which deliver materially higher bit output per wafer than trailing nodes and seem to be t the most effective remaining lever for bit expansion in a wafer-constrained environment.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: With these constraints in mind, the central question is how the industry can meaningfully expand bit supply. We currently forecast ~21% bit growth this year and ~19% next year. In our view, the primary driver of this growth will be accelerated node migration to 1b and 1c across the three major memory suppliers. Achieving this growth requires a faster pace of transition to these nodes, which deliver materially higher bit output per wafer than trailing nodes and seem to be t the most effective remaining lever for bit expansion in a wafer-constrained environment.

pro.text: 鉴于上述产能掣肘，当前的核心命题在于：行业究竟如何才能实现位元供应的实质性扩张？我们目前预测，今年全行业的位元增长约为 21%，明年约为 19%。在我们看来，推动这一增长的核心引擎，将是三大存储供应商全面加速向 1b 和 1c 制程节点演进。要达成上述增长目标，必须大幅加快向新节点的过渡步伐。相较于成熟节点，新节点能带来显著更高的单片晶圆比特产出。在晶圆产能受限的大环境下，这似乎已是实现位元扩张最有效的仅存杠杆。

paragraphs.source: Accordingly, we expect the combined 1b and 1c capacity across the three major memory suppliers to increase by approximately 80% from year-end 4Q25 through 4Q27. Specifically, we believe that by the end of 2026, Samsung and SK Hynix should have close to 30% of their DRAM wafer production on the 1c process node, or at least be targeting a level approaching this threshold. Micron should also be able to allocate roughly 30% of its DRAM production to the 1c (or 1γ) node.

pro.text: 这一行业叙事在过往的 DRAM 上行周期中屡见不鲜，我们此前也曾多次提及：存储供应商正通过节点演进撬动更高的比特产出，以此填补需求缺口。

paragraphs.source: Yet one should note that DRAM node migration introduces meaningful execution friction. New tool sets must be installed, process windows re-optimized, and yields typically deteriorate during the initial ramp phase. As a result, effective wafer capacity and bit output at transitioning fabs often decline for a few quarters before recovering as yields stabilize and learning curves are climbed. The practical implication is that portions of the installed base across all three major memory suppliers will likely experience temporary overall capacity and bit-output disruptions during this transition but a long-term gain in terms of bit output.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Yet one should note that DRAM node migration introduces meaningful execution friction. New tool sets must be installed, process windows re-optimized, and yields typically deteriorate during the initial ramp phase. As a result, effective wafer capacity and bit output at transitioning fabs often decline for a few quarters before recovering as yields stabilize and learning curves are climbed. The practical implication is that portions of the installed base across all three major memory suppliers will likely experience temporary overall capacity and bit-output disruptions during this transition but a long-term gain in terms of bit output.

As a result, effective wafer capacity and bit output at transitioning fabs often decline for a few quarters before recovering as yields stabilize and learning curves are climbed. The practical implication is that portions of the installed base across all three major memory suppliers will likely experience temporary overall capacity and bit-output disruptions during this transition but a long-term gain in terms of bit output.

pro.text: 然而必须警惕的是，DRAM 的节点演进必然伴随显著的落地阻力。产线必须导入全新设备组，重新调校工艺窗口，且在初期产能爬坡阶段，良率折损几乎不可避免。受此拖累，处于过渡期的晶圆厂往往会面临长达数个季度的有效晶圆产能与比特产出双降，直至良率企稳并跨越学习曲线后方可稳步复苏。这意味着在实际操作层面，三大存储供应商的部分现有产线在过渡期内，极易遭遇整体产能与比特产出的短暂阵痛，但以此换取的是长线比特产出的实质性跃升。

sections.title: Supercycle Could be a Double-Edged Sword

paragraphs.source: Unsurprisingly, the first dynamic to emerge in a memory supercycle is an accelerating price uptrend across DRAM products, consistent with patterns observed in prior cycles. For example, DDR5 and LPDDR5 pricing have surged over the past year. We model 1Q26 QoQ contract price increases of 70% for DDR5 and 35% for LPDDR5, pushing prices to approximately $14/GB and $11.5/GB, respectively, by the end of the quarter. Relative to 1Q25, this implies extraordinary YoY price increases of 638% for DDR5 and 369% for LPDDR5.

We model 1Q26 QoQ contract price increases of 70% for DDR5 and 35% for LPDDR5, pushing prices to approximately $14/GB and $11.5/GB, respectively, by the end of the quarter. Relative to 1Q25, this implies extraordinary YoY price increases of 638% for DDR5 and 369% for LPDDR5.

pro.text: 不出所料，存储超级周期中率先显现的动向，便是各类 DRAM 产品价格加速上扬，这与过往周期的规律如出一辙。例如，过去一年间 DDR5 与 LPDDR5 价格一路狂飙。我们在模型中预测，2026 年第一季度 DDR5 与 LPDDR5 的合约价将分别环比大涨 70% 与 35%，推动两者价格在该季度末分别触及约 14 美元/吉字节 (GB) 与 11.5 美元/GB。相较于 2025 年第一季度，这意味着 DDR5 与 LPDDR5 将分别实现 638% 与 369% 的惊人同比涨幅。

paragraphs.source: As we believe the structural shortage is unlikely to improve and the supply environment is set to worsen, DRAM pricing could increase by another ~2× on a 4Q25 versus 4Q26 basis. This is a very favorable setup for leading memory suppliers, although not necessarily beneficial for everyone.

paragraphs.source: Memory price increases are clearly beneficial for memory manufacturers, they come at the expense of customers and the broader end markets. Rising memory content as a share of BoM is creating broad-based margin pressure for mobile and PC OEMs, with the impact varying by scale, pricing power, and product mix. Tier-1 players such as Apple are structurally better positioned due to superior procurement leverage and strong iPhone 17 demand. We estimate Apple faces roughly ~15% memory price increases versus ~20% for the broader industry; however, even Apple is unlikely to be immune, as higher memory costs should still weigh on margins into 2026, with limited evidence to date of ASP increases sufficient to fully offset this pressure.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Memory price increases are clearly beneficial for memory manufacturers, they come at the expense of customers and the broader end markets. Rising memory content as a share of BoM is creating broad-based margin pressure for mobile and PC OEMs, with the impact varying by scale, pricing power, and product mix. Tier-1 players such as Apple are structurally better positioned due to superior procurement leverage and strong iPhone 17 demand. We estimate Apple faces roughly ~15% memory price increases versus ~20% for the broader industry; however, even Apple is unlikely to be immune, as higher memory costs should still weigh on margins into 2026, with limited evidence to date of ASP increases sufficient to fully offset this pressure. Apple’s latest earnings commentary confirmed this and suggested that the larger impact from memory will begin in 2H26, despite more favorable positioning in 1H26.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Memory price increases are clearly beneficial for memory manufacturers, they come at the expense of customers and the broader end markets. Rising memory content as a share of BoM is creating broad-based margin pressure for mobile and PC OEMs, with the impact varying by scale, pricing power, and product mix. Tier-1 players such as Apple are structurally better positioned due to superior procurement leverage and strong iPhone 17 demand. We estimate Apple faces roughly ~15% memory price increases versus ~20% for the broader industry; however, even Apple is unlikely to be immune, as higher memory costs should still weigh on margins into 2026, with limited evidence to date of ASP increases sufficient to fully offset this pressure. Apple’s latest earnings commentary confirmed this and suggested that the larger impact from memory will begin in 2H26, despite more favorable positioning in 1H26.

pro.text: 存储涨价固然让存储制造商获益匪浅，但这却是以牺牲客户及更广泛的终端市场为代价的。随着存储在 BoM 中的占比不断攀升，手机与 PC OEM 正面临普遍的利润率挤压，其受冲击程度因企业规模、定价权与产品组合而异。得益于卓越的采购话语权与强劲的 iPhone 17 需求，苹果等 Tier-1 玩家在结构上占据更有利的位置。我们测算，苹果面临的存储涨幅约为 15%，而行业整体涨幅则高达约 20%；然而，即便是苹果也难以独善其身。高昂的存储成本势必将持续拖累其 2026 年的利润率，且迄今为止，鲜有证据表明其 ASP 的提升足以完全抵消这一压力。

paragraphs.source: In contrast, Tier-1.5 and Tier-2 mobile OEMs—particularly Chinese vendors—face significantly greater margin stress given limited ability to pass through higher costs. This is already driving selective price increases and potential specification downgrades, especially in entry- and mid-range devices, where gross margins could compress sharply if memory prices rise further. High-end models are less likely to see specification cuts but may eventually face price increases should elevated pricing persist. With the price hike, we think the mobile shipment outlook should be downgraded in 2026, and we are seeing clear signs across companies participating in the supply chain.

pro.text: 相比之下，1.5 线和二线手机 OEM（尤其是中国厂商）转嫁高昂成本的能力有限，正面临严峻得多的利润率压力。这已促使厂商进行选择性涨价并可能采取减配措施，尤其是在入门级与中端机型上；若存储价格进一步攀升，这些机型的毛利率恐将大幅收缩。高端机型减配的可能性较小，但若高价位持续，最终也难逃涨价命运。伴随这波涨价潮，我们认为应下调 2026 年的手机出货量预期，且供应链各环节的企业已显露出清晰的疲软信号。

key_points: DDR5 and LPDDR5 contract prices are experiencing extraordinary QoQ and YoY surges.
Tier-1.5 and Tier-2 mobile OEMs (especially Chinese vendors) face severe margin stress due to their inability to pass through higher costs.
This margin squeeze is forcing selective price increases and potential specification downgrades in entry- and mid-range devices.

issues.description: 翻译过度渲染了原文的情感色彩。原文“compress sharply”意为“大幅收缩”或“严重承压”，而“断崖式下跌”过于夸张，不符合分析师冷峻精准的声线。
“面临下游盈利承压”表意模糊，容易被误解为“下游企业自身面临盈利压力”。原文“downstream earnings pressure for chipmakers and ODMs”是指这些中上游企业因为下游需求疲软而面临盈利压力。
目标读者为资深半导体与金融分析师，对“PC”、“Tier-1”等术语非常熟悉，过度加注（如“个人电脑 (PC)”、“(或一线)”）显得冗余，打断阅读节奏。同理，段落 0 中的“吉字节 (GB)”也属过度加注。
中英文之间缺乏空格（CJK-Latin spacing 规范）。

paragraphs.source: A similar dynamic is emerging in PCs, where OEMs have already implemented selective price increases and are considering specification downgrades in mid- and lower-tier products since 4Q25. Compounding the pressure from rising memory costs, PC OEMs are also facing higher processor pricing. This “double hike” materially increases the risk of ASP inflation, weaker demand elasticity, shipment declines into 2026, and downstream earnings pressure for chipmakers and ODMs with high exposure to PC and mobile volumes.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: A similar dynamic is emerging in PCs, where OEMs have already implemented selective price increases and are considering specification downgrades in mid- and lower-tier products since 4Q25. Compounding the pressure from rising memory costs, PC OEMs are also facing higher processor pricing. This “double hike” materially increases the risk of ASP inflation, weaker demand elasticity, shipment declines into 2026, and downstream earnings pressure for chipmakers and ODMs with high exposure to PC and mobile volumes.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: A similar dynamic is emerging in PCs, where OEMs have already implemented selective price increases and are considering specification downgrades in mid- and lower-tier products since 4Q25. Compounding the pressure from rising memory costs, PC OEMs are also facing higher processor pricing. This “double hike” materially increases the risk of ASP inflation, weaker demand elasticity, shipment declines into 2026, and downstream earnings pressure for chipmakers and ODMs with high exposure to PC and mobile volumes.

pro.text: PC 市场也正呈现类似动向。自 2025 年第四季度起，OEM 已实施选择性涨价，并正酝酿对中低端产品进行减配。除了存储成本飙升带来的压力，PC OEM 还面临处理器涨价的双重夹击。这种“双重涨价”实质性放大了多重风险：ASP 膨胀、需求弹性减弱、2026 年出货量下滑，以及高度依赖 PC 与手机出货量的芯片制造商和 ODM 面临来自下游的盈利压力。

paragraphs.source: As a result, we remain cautious—and in some cases bearish—on select names across this ecosystem. Given the potential impact on demand elasticity, it will be critical to closely monitor shipment trends in both PCs and mobile, which together account for roughly ~30% of total DRAM end demand, as any meaningful volume deterioration could weigh on overall end-market demand. Nonetheless, given the increasing weight of servers in the DRAM end market and accelerating server DRAM demand, we believe this should more than offset demand softness in consumer DRAM.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: As a result, we remain cautious—and in some cases bearish—on select names across this ecosystem. Given the potential impact on demand elasticity, it will be critical to closely monitor shipment trends in both PCs and mobile, which together account for roughly ~30% of total DRAM end demand, as any meaningful volume deterioration could weigh on overall end-market demand. Nonetheless, given the increasing weight of servers in the DRAM end market and accelerating server DRAM demand, we believe this should more than offset demand softness in consumer DRAM.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: As a result, we remain cautious—and in some cases bearish—on select names across this ecosystem. Given the potential impact on demand elasticity, it will be critical to closely monitor shipment trends in both PCs and mobile, which together account for roughly ~30% of total DRAM end demand, as any meaningful volume deterioration could weigh on overall end-market demand. Nonetheless, given the increasing weight of servers in the DRAM end market and accelerating server DRAM demand, we believe this should more than offset demand softness in consumer DRAM.

pro.text: 因此，我们对该生态系统中的部分标的保持谨慎——在某些情况下甚至看跌。鉴于其对需求弹性的潜在影响，密切关注 PC 与手机的出货趋势至关重要。两者合计约占 DRAM 终端总需求的 30%，任何实质性的销量下滑都可能拖累整体终端市场需求。尽管如此，考虑到服务器在 DRAM 终端市场中的比重日益增加，且服务器 DRAM 需求正在加速，我们认为这足以抵消消费级 DRAM 需求的疲软。

paragraphs.source: Beyond mobile, PCs, and other consumer electronics, we believe it is also important to consider the impact of “memoryflation” on AI servers and ODMs as the industry should gradually see a meaningful impact from the memory and storage price hike. We highlighted this last week on our institutional platform, Core Research.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Beyond mobile, PCs, and other consumer electronics, we believe it is also important to consider the impact of “memoryflation” on AI servers and ODMs as the industry should gradually see a meaningful impact from the memory and storage price hike. We highlighted this last week on our institutional platform, Core Research.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Beyond mobile, PCs, and other consumer electronics, we believe it is also important to consider the impact of “memoryflation” on AI servers and ODMs as the industry should gradually see a meaningful impact from the memory and storage price hike. We highlighted this last week on our institutional platform, Core Research.

pro.text: 除了手机、PC 及其他消费电子产品，我们认为同样必须考量“存储通胀”对 AI 服务器及 ODM 的影响，因为整个行业必将逐渐感受到内存与存储价格飙升带来的实质性冲击。上周，我们已在机构平台 Core Research 上强调了这一点。

paragraphs.source: Unlike commodity DRAM, HBM typically provides suppliers with greater visibility and long-term volume commitments, but it also limits the ability to raise prices intra-year. This model is advantageous during downcycles or modest upcycles, as it supports more stable earnings and margins. However, in a supercycle of this magnitude, it can cap upside relative to commodity DRAM, where pricing can “re-rate” much more rapidly. This asymmetry is a key reason we turned bullish on Samsung while holding a bullish view on SK Hynix, which Core Research subscribers learned in our November note. There, we highlighted Samsung’s significantly greater exposure to commodity DRAM relative to its peers.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Unlike commodity DRAM, HBM typically provides suppliers with greater visibility and long-term volume commitments, but it also limits the ability to raise prices intra-year. This model is advantageous during downcycles or modest upcycles, as it supports more stable earnings and margins. However, in a supercycle of this magnitude, it can cap upside relative to commodity DRAM, where pricing can “re-rate” much more rapidly. This asymmetry is a key reason we turned bullish on Samsung while holding a bullish view on SK Hynix, which [Core Research](https://semianalysis.com/core-research/) subscribers learned in our November note. There, we highlighted Samsung’s significantly greater exposure to commodity DRAM relative to its peers.

However, in a supercycle of this magnitude, it can cap upside relative to commodity DRAM, where pricing can “re-rate” much more rapidly. This asymmetry is a key reason we turned bullish on Samsung while holding a bullish view on SK Hynix, which Core Research subscribers learned in our November note. There, we highlighted Samsung’s significantly greater exposure to commodity DRAM relative to its peers.

pro.text: 与标准型 DRAM 不同，HBM 通常能为供应商提供更高的订单可见度与长期销量承诺，但也限制了年内提价的能力。在下行周期或温和上行周期中，这种模式极具优势，能支撑更稳定的盈利与利润率。然而，在如此量级的超级周期中，与价格能迅速“价值重估”的标准型 DRAM 相比，HBM 反而会限制上行空间。这种不对称性正是我们在维持看好SK海力士的同时、转而看多三星的核心逻辑，Core Research 的订阅用户在我们 11 月的报告中已获悉此观点。在该报告中，我们着重指出三星在标准型 DRAM 领域的业务敞口显著高于同行。

paragraphs.source: Back in early 4Q25, market consensus shifted toward a roughly 15–20% ASP decline for HBM3E 12-hi in 2026. This will not be the case in our view, which we noted to our institutional client last month. Flat pricing for HBM3E 12-hi in 2026 is now a more reasonable assumption, given the current pricing environment, a higher-than-expected mix of HBM3E, potential incremental orders tied to H200 demand, and tightening HBM3E supply as HBM4 ramps later this year. For Samsung, which priced HBM3E below both SK Hynix and Micron in 2025, a 10–15% price increase is achievable this year, supported by improving HBM3E 12-hi performance and rising shipment volumes this year.

pro.text: 早在 2025 年第四季度初，市场共识曾倾向于 2026 年 12层HBM3E 的平均售价 (ASP) 将出现约 15% 至 20% 的下滑。我们认为实际情况并非如此，上个月我们也已向机构客户明确了这一点。鉴于当前的定价环境、超预期的 HBM3E 产品占比、与 H200 需求挂钩的潜在增量订单，以及今年晚些时候 HBM4 产能爬坡引发的 HBM3E 供应收紧，预计 2026 年 12层HBM3E 价格持平是更为合理的假设。对三星而言，其 2025 年的 HBM3E 定价低于SK海力士与美光；在 12层HBM3E 性能改善与年内出货量攀升的双重驱动下，三星今年完全有望实现 10% 至 15% 的提价。

paragraphs.source: It’s also important to address the HBM4 qualification progress: based on our supply-chain checks, the latest HBM4 engineering samples from memory suppliers remain below target specifications in terms of pin speed. We noted this to our client of the Accelerator & HBM model update in early January. The samples from both Samsung and SK Hynix are operating at approximately 10 Gbps, while Micron’s HBM4 samples are exhibiting much lower pin speeds, which will impact their share and ramp-up timeline for HBM4. This gap underscores the increased technical complexity of HBM4 and the higher likelihood of issues during ramp-up for memory suppliers.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: It’s also important to address the HBM4 qualification progress: based on our supply-chain checks, the latest HBM4 engineering samples from memory suppliers remain below target specifications in terms of pin speed. We [noted](https://semianalysis.com/accelerator-hbm-model/) this to our client of the [Accelerator & HBM model](https://semianalysis.com/accelerator-hbm-model/) update in early January. The samples from both Samsung and SK Hynix are operating at approximately 10 Gbps, while Micron’s HBM4 samples are exhibiting much lower pin speeds, which will impact their share and ramp-up timeline for HBM4. This gap underscores the increased technical complexity of HBM4 and the higher likelihood of issues during ramp-up for memory suppliers.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: It’s also important to address the HBM4 qualification progress: based on our supply-chain checks, the latest HBM4 engineering samples from memory suppliers remain below target specifications in terms of pin speed. We noted this to our client of the Accelerator & HBM model update in early January. The samples from both Samsung and SK Hynix are operating at approximately 10 Gbps, while Micron’s HBM4 samples are exhibiting much lower pin speeds, which will impact their share and ramp-up timeline for HBM4. This gap underscores the increased technical complexity of HBM4 and the higher likelihood of issues during ramp-up for memory suppliers.

pro.text: 探讨 HBM4 的验证进度同样至关重要：根据我们的供应链调研，各大存储供应商最新交付的 HBM4 工程样品，在引脚速率方面仍未达到目标规格。我们在 1 月初更新 Accelerator & HBM model 时，已向客户提示过此风险。目前三星与SK海力士的样品运行速率约为 10 Gbps，而美光的 HBM4 样品引脚速率远不及此，这必将拖累其 HBM4 的市场份额与产能爬坡时间表。这一差距凸显了 HBM4 技术复杂性的剧增，也意味着存储供应商在产能爬坡期间遭遇瓶颈的概率大增。

paragraphs.source: At a more granular level, Samsung’s HBM4 front-end (1c) appears competitive on both performance and power efficiency, in some cases consuming less power than SK Hynix. However, Hynix continues to demonstrate an advantage in signal integrity, with lower jitter reflecting stronger package-level execution. With respect to Micron, despite management’s stated confidence in HBM4, we remain skeptical of execution given persistent challenges in meeting NVIDIA’s required pin speeds. More specifically, we believe the HBM4 competition is likely to consolidate into a two-player race led by the Korean memory suppliers, particularly in the case of NVIDIA, the largest end customer for HBM4.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: At a more granular level, Samsung’s HBM4 front-end (1c) appears competitive on both performance and power efficiency, in some cases consuming less power than SK Hynix. However, Hynix continues to demonstrate an advantage in signal integrity, with lower jitter reflecting stronger package-level execution. With respect to Micron, despite management’s stated confidence in HBM4, we remain skeptical of execution given persistent challenges in meeting NVIDIA’s required pin speeds. More specifically, we believe the HBM4 competition is likely to consolidate into a two-player race led by the Korean memory suppliers, particularly in the case of NVIDIA, the largest end customer for HBM4.

With respect to Micron, despite management’s stated confidence in HBM4, we remain skeptical of execution given persistent challenges in meeting NVIDIA’s required pin speeds. More specifically, we believe the HBM4 competition is likely to consolidate into a two-player race led by the Korean memory suppliers, particularly in the case of NVIDIA, the largest end customer for HBM4.

pro.text: 从更微观的层面来看，三星的 HBM4 前道工艺（1c 节点）在性能与能效上均具备竞争力，部分场景下的功耗甚至低于SK海力士。然而，SK海力士在信号完整性上持续保持优势，其更低的抖动印证了在封装层面的卓越执行力。至于美光，尽管管理层对 HBM4 信心满满，但鉴于其迟迟无法达到英伟达要求的引脚速率，我们对其执行力仍持怀疑态度。具体而言，我们认为 HBM4 的竞争极可能演变为由韩国存储双雄主导的格局，尤其是在争夺 HBM4 最大终端客户英伟达的订单时。

paragraphs.source: That said, even as Samsung narrows the performance gap in HBM4, SK Hynix’s proven track record and reliability continue to position it as the dominant HBM supplier for Rubin. Accordingly, for R200-class HBM supply, we envision SK hynix capturing approximately ~60% share, followed by Samsung at ~30%, with Micron accounting for none in the first 12 months of Rubin.

pro.text: 尽管如此，即便三星正在缩小 HBM4 的性能差距，SK海力士凭借备受认可的历史业绩与可靠性，依然稳居 Rubin 核心 HBM 供应商的宝座。因此，针对 R200级 HBM 供应，我们预计SK海力士将斩获约 60% 的份额，三星紧随其后占据约 30%，而美光在 Rubin 上市的首个 12 个月内将颗粒无收。

paragraphs.source: We believe the technical complexity of HBM4 could pressure supplier margins due to a more difficult yield learning curve and slow the pace of the product mix transition relative to prior expectations. As a result, HBM3E is likely to represent a higher mix of the overall HBM portfolio in 2026 than some initially forecasted. We think the meaningful crossover to HBM4 should happen in 2H26.

pro.text: 我们认为，HBM4 的技术复杂性将带来更为陡峭的良率爬坡曲线，这不仅会挤压供应商的利润率，还将拖慢产品组合转换的步伐，使其落后于先前的预期。因此，到 2026 年，HBM3E 在整体 HBM 产品矩阵中占据的比重，大概率将高于部分机构的初期预测。我们预计，向 HBM4 实质性的世代交替将在 2026 年下半年到来。

paragraphs.source: History suggests that even the largest memory supercycles do not last indefinitely, and we believe this cycle will be no exception. That said, as we have previously maintained, we think this cycle could be larger and last longer than prior cycles. In our view, the supercycle can extend through 2027, with conditions becoming more challenging and volatile in late 2027 and into 2028—a view some may consider aggressive, but one echoed by many industry participants we spoke with, though not universally shared. A few things we think are going to happen, and some are already happening:

paragraphs.source: More fab pull-ins and capacity expansion: We expect additional fab schedule pull-ins across all three major memory suppliers as capacity expansion plans accelerate, and we are already seeing early evidence of this trend. SK hynix has pulled in the schedules for both its M15X and Yongin Phase 1 fabs. Micron is also accelerating capacity, pulling in its Idaho 1 ramp from 2H27 to mid-2027, while its recent acquisition of PSMC’s fab adds up to ~45k wafers per month of potential capacity, which is expected to begin contributing wafer output in 2H27 with gradual ramp-up timeframe. Capacity expansion will come more meaningfully when memory supplier’s cleanroom coming online mostly by the end of 2027, and we might hear additional news on its future capacity expansion plan.

pro.text: 晶圆厂进度提前与产能扩张提速： 随着扩产计划加速，我们预计三大存储供应商均会进一步将晶圆厂日程提前，目前该趋势已初露端倪。SK海力士已将 M15X 与龙仁（Yongin）一期晶圆厂的建设节点双双提前。美光亦在加速扩产，将其爱达荷州 1 厂的产能爬坡节点从 2027 年下半年提前至 2027 年中。此外，美光近期收购的力积电（PSMC）晶圆厂每月可补充约 4.5 万片晶圆的潜在产能，预计将于 2027 年下半年开始贡献晶圆产出，并逐步进入爬坡期。到 2027 年底，随着存储供应商的洁净室大规模投用，产能扩张将迎来实质性跃升，届时市场或将传出更多关于未来扩产计划的动向。

paragraphs.source: Ongoing HBM acceleration and sustained pressure on commodity: We believe memory suppliers will continue to prioritize HBM as their top strategic focus, given its structurally superior returns and long-term growth potential relative to commodity DRAM. While conventional DRAM is also entering a highly favorable pricing environment, HBM represents a more sustainable and strategically important opportunity over the long term. As a result, we expect the tension between allocating capacity to HBM versus commodity DRAM to remain top of mind for memory company executives.

paragraphs.source: A unifying theme across these three developments - fab pull-ins, accelerated node migration, and increased HBM prioritization - is rising demand for WFE. To enable this development, memory suppliers are likely to materially increase DRAM capex to support fab build-outs, advanced-node transitions, and incremental HBM wafer capacity. The market has already priced in at least some of this cycle, especially in logic, after the TSMC 2026 capex came in much higher than expected, with much stronger conviction for the capex increase in the next few years.

The market has already priced in at least some of this cycle, especially in logic, after the TSMC 2026 capex came in much higher than expected, with much stronger conviction for the capex increase in the next few years.

pro.text: 晶圆厂进度提前、节点演进提速与 HBM 战略优先级跃升，这三大趋势共同指向一个核心主线：对 WFE (晶圆制造设备) 的需求正日益高涨。为支撑上述布局，存储供应商势必大幅追加 DRAM 资本支出。这笔资金将用于晶圆厂建设、先进节点过渡以及扩充 HBM 晶圆增量产能。市场已在一定程度上对本轮周期进行了定价，逻辑芯片领域尤为显著。此前，台积电（TSMC）公布的 2026 年资本支出远超预期，进一步夯实了市场对未来数年资本支出攀升的笃定预期。

我们预计，这一势头将加速向存储生态系统蔓延，令前道与后道设备供应商双双获益。事实上，就在本周，阿斯麦管理层对存储领域的 EUV 需求给出了极为强劲的展望。其核心驱动力在于：
1) HBM 晶圆产能的迅猛扩张与 EUV 光刻层数的硬性需求；
2) 供应商向 1b 节点与 1c 节点演进的迫切诉求。

paragraphs.source: There are a few clear areas where EUV can replace DUV multipatterning, most in the congested region where access transistors (the devices that allow read and write to the memory cell) meet the memory storage capacitors (which stores the charge representing a 1 or 0). Contacts between access transistor source and storage capacitor, along with the transistor drain to bitline, are probably the first to go to EUV. They are cylindrical vias with small dimension in both X and Y, which generally makes them more difficult than narrow lines. It’s similar to 7nm logic, where the tightest pitch via layers were the first to adopt EUV.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: There are a few clear areas where EUV can replace DUV multipatterning, most in the congested region where access transistors (the devices that allow read and write to the memory cell) meet the memory storage capacitors (which stores the charge representing a 1 or 0). Contacts between access transistor source and storage capacitor, along with the transistor drain to bitline, are probably the first to go to EUV. They are cylindrical vias with small dimension in both X and Y, which generally makes them more difficult than narrow lines. It’s similar to 7nm logic, where the tightest pitch via layers were the first to adopt EUV.

Contacts between access transistor source and storage capacitor, along with the transistor drain to bitline, are probably the first to go to EUV. They are cylindrical vias with small dimension in both X and Y, which generally makes them more difficult than narrow lines. It’s similar to 7nm logic, where the tightest pitch via layers were the first to adopt EUV.

pro.text: 在几个明确的区域，EUV 可替代 DUV 多重曝光，主要集中在存取晶体管（用于读写存储单元）与存储电容（用于存储代表 1 或 0 的电荷）交汇的密集区域。存取晶体管源极与存储电容之间的接触点，以及晶体管漏极与位线之间的接触点，极可能率先转用 EUV。这些接触点是圆柱形通孔，在 X 和 Y 方向上的尺寸均极小，这使得其制造难度通常高于窄线。这与 7 纳米逻辑工艺类似，后者也是在间距最紧密的通孔层率先采用 EUV。

understanding.role_in_article: 待分析

paragraphs.source: Next the bitline, wordline, gate, and active area cuts are good candidates for EUV. Narrow lines are relatively easy to produce with DUV multipatterning (pitch splitting), but cutting the line ends is very difficult. You can see in the diagram below how small the tip-to-tip distance needs to be in some cases - look at the ends of the bitlines. Other line ends aren’t shown but have a similar challenge.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Next the bitline, wordline, gate, and active area cuts are good candidates for EUV. Narrow lines are relatively easy to produce with DUV multipatterning (pitch splitting), but cutting the line ends is very difficult. You can see in the diagram below how small the tip-to-tip distance needs to be in some cases - look at the ends of the bitlines. Other line ends aren’t shown but have a similar challenge.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Next the bitline, wordline, gate, and active area cuts are good candidates for EUV. Narrow lines are relatively easy to produce with DUV multipatterning (pitch splitting), but cutting the line ends is very difficult. You can see in the diagram below how small the tip-to-tip distance needs to be in some cases - look at the ends of the bitlines. Other line ends aren’t shown but have a similar challenge.

pro.text: 接下来，位线、字线、栅极与有源区切割也是采用 EUV 的理想对象。使用 DUV 多重曝光（间距拆分）制造窄线相对容易，但切割线端却极具挑战。从下图可以看出，在某些情况下，端到端距离需要做到极小——请留意位线的末端。其他线端虽未在图中标出，但也面临着同样的挑战。

paragraphs.source: DRAM EUV intensity will increase substantially in the short term, as chipmakers are rushing to convert as much capacity as they can to the latest, EUV-heavy, processes. Longer term, they are taking steps to rein in cost. SK Hynix will continue to increase EUV layer count in the upcoming 1γ process, but predicts EUV spend will begin to level off. This is due to likely MOR adoption, which effectively increases throughput per tool without paying ASML for an upgrade, and possibly other improvements. Still, a slower increase in EUV spend is still an increase and great for ASML.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: DRAM EUV intensity will increase substantially in the short term, as chipmakers are rushing to convert as much capacity as they can to the latest, EUV-heavy, processes. Longer term, they are taking steps to rein in cost. SK Hynix will continue to increase EUV layer count in the upcoming 1γ process, but predicts EUV spend will begin to level off. This is due to likely MOR adoption, which effectively increases throughput per tool without paying ASML for an upgrade, and possibly other improvements. Still, a *slower* increase in EUV spend is still an increase and great for ASML.

Longer term, they are taking steps to rein in cost. SK Hynix will continue to increase EUV layer count in the upcoming 1γ process, but predicts EUV spend will begin to level off. This is due to likely MOR adoption, which effectively increases throughput per tool without paying ASML for an upgrade, and possibly other improvements. Still, a slower increase in EUV spend is still an increase and great for ASML.

pro.text: 短期内，DRAM 的 EUV 采用强度将大幅攀升，因为芯片制造商正争相将尽可能多的产能转换为高度依赖 EUV 的最新工艺。长期来看，他们正采取措施控制成本。SK海力士将在即将推出的 1γ节点中继续增加 EUV 光刻层数，但预计 EUV 支出将开始趋于平稳。这主要归因于其可能采用金属氧化物光刻胶 (MOR)，该技术无需向阿斯麦 (ASML) 支付升级费用即可有效提升单台设备的吞吐量，同时可能还伴随其他技术改进。即便如此，EUV 支出增速的放缓依然意味着绝对支出的增长，这对阿斯麦 (ASML) 而言无疑是重大利好。

paragraphs.source: DRAM WFE capex will increase by roughly 26%, 34%, and 20% for Samsung, SK hynix, and Micron, respectively, in 2026. These increases are driven by aggressive HBM capacity expansion, rapid migration to 1b and 1c nodes with higher EUV layer intensity, and fab build-outs slated to come online in 2027, alongside accelerating node migration across the industry. We expect this view to be validated as the upcoming earnings season reflects semiconductor management commentary, alongside capital expenditure guidance from the memory companies.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: DRAM WFE capex will increase by roughly 26%, 34%, and 20% for Samsung, SK hynix, and Micron, respectively, in 2026. These increases are driven by aggressive HBM capacity expansion, rapid migration to 1b and 1c nodes with higher EUV layer intensity, and fab build-outs slated to come online in 2027, alongside accelerating node migration across the industry. We expect this view to be validated as the upcoming earnings season reflects semiconductor management commentary, alongside capital expenditure guidance from the memory companies.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: DRAM WFE capex will increase by roughly 26%, 34%, and 20% for Samsung, SK hynix, and Micron, respectively, in 2026. These increases are driven by aggressive HBM capacity expansion, rapid migration to 1b and 1c nodes with higher EUV layer intensity, and fab build-outs slated to come online in 2027, alongside accelerating node migration across the industry. We expect this view to be validated as the upcoming earnings season reflects semiconductor management commentary, alongside capital expenditure guidance from the memory companies.

pro.text: 2026 年，三星、SK海力士和美光的 DRAM 晶圆制造设备（WFE）资本支出将分别增长约 26%、34% 和 20%。这一增长受多重因素驱动：激进的 HBM 产能扩张，向 EUV 层采用强度更高的 1b 和 1c 节点快速演进，计划于 2027 年投产的晶圆厂扩建项目，以及全行业不断加速的节点演进。我们预计，随着即将到来的财报季披露半导体管理层的表态与存储厂商的资本支出指引，这一观点将得到印证。
